name: Arm Mobile Studio
description: Suite of free Arm GPU performance analysis tools (Streamline, Frame Advisor, Mali Offline Compiler) for profiling and optimising Android games on Arm-based devices.

seo.title: Arm Mobile Studio — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: Arm Mobile Studio: Suite of free Arm GPU performance analysis tools (Streamline, Frame Advisor, Mali Offline Compiler) for profiling and optimising Android game

when_to_use: GPU frame profiling for Android game optimization
Mali shader offline compilation to catch bottlenecks early
Memory bandwidth analysis for mobile battery efficiency
Frame Advisor workflow for reducing overdraw in 2D games
Streamline timeline tracing for Unity Arm build targets

pros: Free deep GPU profiling for Mali and Immortalis chips
Streamline captures CPU, GPU, and memory in one timeline
Frame Advisor flags shader and overdraw hotspots directly
Mali Offline Compiler shows cycle cost per shader
cons: Only useful for Arm-based Android targets
UI feels dated and occasionally unstable on macOS
Learning curve is steep for non-graphics engineers
Integration requires gatord daemon setup on device
review.verdict: The definitive free profiler if you ship to Mali GPUs; irrelevant if you target Adreno or PowerVR only.
review.best_for: Mobile studios optimizing Android games for Arm Mali and Immortalis GPU hardware
review.not_for: Console, desktop, or iOS developers who dont ship to Arm Mali devices
